title: atalantia ceylanica var. rotundifolia
intro: Atalantia ceylanica var. rotundifolia, a variant of the Atalantia ceylanica plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a treatment for fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Atalantia ceylanica var. rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
